body:
Title: CRA Form T1170 2025 Capital Gains on Gifts of Certain Capital Property.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/t1170/t1170-25e.pdf

CRA T1170 2025 applies to gifts of listed securities, mutual fund corporation shares, mutual fund trust units, prescribed debt obligations, related segregated fund trust interests, and ecological gifts to certain qualified donees. If there is no advantage in respect of the gift, the full capital gain is eligible for an inclusion rate of zero. If there is an advantage, only a portion of the capital gain is eligible for the zero inclusion rate and the rest is subject to the 50% inclusion rate, encoded as 0.50. The table columns calculate gain as column 2 proceeds of disposition minus column 3 adjusted cost base and column 4 outlays and expenses. Column 7 gain eligible for the 0% inclusion rate is column 5 gain multiplied by column 6 eligible amount of gift divided by column 2 proceeds. Column 8 gain subject to the 50% inclusion rate is column 5 minus column 7. The shares and units table says to include the amount from column 8 on Schedule 3 Part 3 line 13200. The bonds, debentures, and other properties table uses the same column 7 and column 8 calculations for gains on those gifts.
citation_label: CRA Form T1170 2025 Capital Gains on Gifts of Certain Capital Property
